Name: nixtla-baseline-lab
What: Run statistical forecasting baseline models (AutoETS, AutoTheta, SeasonalNaive) on M4 benchmark datasets and return accuracy metrics (sMAPE, MASE)
When: Model benchmarking, baseline comparison, forecast accuracy validation
Where: Claude Code plugin with MCP server; statsforecast, datasetsforecast, local Python
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Generates results CSV with per-model metrics; smoke test completes successfully; MCP server responds
Definition_of_Success_Business: Demonstrates statsforecast models work; enables model comparison
Target_Goal: sMAPE < 5% on M4 Daily; smoke test < 90 seconds

Name: nixtla-bigquery-forecaster
What: Query BigQuery datasets, run statsforecast models, return forecasts as JSON; deploy via Cloud Functions
When: BigQuery pipeline integration, serverless forecast generation
Where: Google Cloud Function (Gen2, Python 3.12); BigQuery connector; JSON output
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Cloud Function deploys; HTTP 200 with valid JSON; processes queries without errors
Target_Goal: Process 1000 rows in < 10 seconds; deploy via CI/CD

Name: nixtla-search-to-slack
Who: Content curators, teams wanting Nixtla content discovery
What: Search web and GitHub for Nixtla content, deduplicate, post to Slack
Where: Python orchestration; SerpAPI, GitHub API, Slack SDK
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Retrieves content; deduplicates by URL; posts to Slack; tests pass
Target_Goal: Post curated digest to Slack channel without errors

Name: nixtla-airflow-operator
What: Enable TimeGPT/StatsForecast execution within Apache Airflow
When: Schedule forecasting jobs in data pipelines
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Models execute within Airflow; integrates with XCom
Target_Goal: Execute forecast task in Airflow DAG successfully

Name: nixtla-anomaly-streaming-monitor
What: Stream-based anomaly detection for production metrics
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Detects anomalies in streaming data; generates alerts
Target_Goal: Detect anomaly within 30 seconds of occurrence

Name: nixtla-dbt-package
What: Native dbt integration for TimeGPT forecasting
When: Generate forecasts as part of dbt jobs
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Integrates with dbt; materializes predictions as tables
Target_Goal: dbt run completes with forecast table materialized

Name: nixtla-roi-calculator
What: Interactive calculator for TimeGPT ROI estimation
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Generates ROI estimates based on inputs
Target_Goal: Generate ROI estimate from user inputs in < 2 seconds

Name: nixtla-snowflake-adapter
What: Query Snowflake data and run forecasts via UDF functions
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Executes forecasts within Snowflake; returns results
Target_Goal: Execute NIXTLA_FORECAST() UDF and return results

Name: nixtla-vs-statsforecast-benchmark
What: Benchmarking tool comparing TimeGPT vs StatsForecast
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Runs benchmarks on datasets; generates comparison reports

Name: nixtla-cost-optimizer
What: Forecast cloud costs and recommend optimizations
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Generates cost forecasts; identifies optimization opportunities
Target_Goal: Generate cost forecast and optimization recommendations

Name: nixtla-forecast-explainer
What: Generate plain-English explanations of forecast results
Definition_of_Success_Business: Makes forecasts accessible to non-technical users
Target_Goal: Generate explanation readable by non-technical user

Name: nixtla-migration-assistant
What: Guided migration from legacy forecasting systems to TimeGPT
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Converts legacy code; validates output equivalence
Target_Goal: Convert Prophet/SARIMA code to TimeGPT equivalent

Name: nixtla-defi-sentinel
What: Anomaly detection on blockchain metrics for exploit detection
Definition_of_Success_Technical: Detects anomalies in blockchain data; generates alerts
Target_Goal: Detect anomaly in blockchain data stream
